negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday liquidity shelf decay break rank over shelf touch density, dwell compression, shelf break impulse, rejection balance, false-touch absorption, range energy release, volume escape ratio, VWAP shelf distance, prior session shelf context, shelf position pressure, session maturity, and spread stress inverse features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0118 R0001 shows the tested liquidity shelf decay break surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0118 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0119 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: entry activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 1 profitable and 8 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -101.52, and worst fold rw_005 net PnL -22.11.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution differed from closed-bar logic by 19.28 total net PnL across 3 better and 6 worse folds; closeout remains bounded to fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0118 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or liquidity-shelf-decay-break feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday liquidity shelf decay break rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0118 R0001 tests whether repeated intraday shelf touches, low-variance dwell compression, false-touch absorption, and shelf break or rejection impulse can rank target-first US100 M5 entries after realistic FPMarkets spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0117 overnight inventory unwind, C0116 day open anchor reclaim, C0115 prior day range boundary acceptance, C0114 momentum-volume divergence reversal, and C0113 session percentile transition. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0117 overnight-inventory thresholds, C0116 day-open-anchor thresholds, C0115 boundary thresholds, stops, targets, sessions, spread caps, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.

surface_distance_rationale.feature: Shelf touch density, dwell compression, break impulse, false-touch absorption, and shelf/VWAP distance features replace overnight inventory, day-open anchor, prior-day boundary, and divergence features.
surface_distance_rationale.label: Target-first quality after liquidity shelf decay break, not overnight inventory unwind or day-open anchor reclaim.
surface_distance_rationale.model: Fold-local linear liquidity shelf decay break rank.
surface_distance_rationale.trade_logic: Dual-direction score keyed by shelf decay/break state.

pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: New major campaign surface asks whether shelf touch density plus compression and escape/rejection pressure creates portable entries after paired MT5 validation.

feature.summary: shelf touch density; dwell compression; shelf break impulse; rejection balance; false-touch absorption; range energy release; volume escape ratio; VWAP shelf distance; prior session shelf context; shelf position pressure; session maturity; spread stress inverse.

label.summary: target-first quality after liquidity shelf decay break.

model.summary: fold-local linear intraday liquidity shelf decay break rank.

trade_logic.summary: dual-direction top fold-local liquidity-shelf-decay-break scores per active day using next-bar-open fixed-lot discovery entries.
